betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§o"I've learned of a source of highly concentrated energy called Ember. Unfortunately it's buried in the bedrock where my tools can't reach, but the Ancient Codex mentions a device for extracting this material from the Bedrock; The Ember Bore. I'll need to craft an Ember Bore and place it near the Bedrock so it can gather some crystallized Ember."

§o§rCraft an Ember Bore and place it near bedrock. It can be placed directly on it, or a couple of blocks above it for aesthitics since it has a spinning blade beneath.
This block has no interface: fuel must be fed in using a hopper or item pipe. To better connect with the machine, use a Machine Accessor since it will give you more block faces to attach things like hoppers or item extractors.
